bracketPreviewEmpty: Select at least 2 participants to preview the bracket.
deleteModalBodyMatch: This match will be soft-deleted and Elo scores will be recalculated.
deleteModalBodySeason: All linked tournaments and matches will be soft-deleted and Elo scores will be recalculated.
deleteModalBodyTournament: All tournament matches will be soft-deleted and Elo scores will be recalculated.
deleteModalSeasonHint: Type the season name to confirm.
leaderboardEmptySeason: No ranked results in this season yet.
leaderboardEmptyTournament: No ranked results in this tournament yet.
loginText: Your internal ping pong leaderboard. Sign in with your Google account to view rankings, record matches, and join tournaments.
matchFieldSeasonLockedHint: Season is set automatically when the selected tournament belongs to one.
matchOutcomePending: Winner updates automatically from the score.
matchLockBracketLocked: This bracket pairing is locked because players already advanced.
matchLockSeasonComplete: This season is completed and no further matches can be added.
matchLockTournamentComplete: This tournament is completed and no further matches can be added.
seasonLockCompleted: This season is completed and can no longer be edited.
seasonLockDeleted: This item was deleted and is no longer editable.
tournamentLockCompleted: This tournament is completed and can no longer be edited.
tournamentLockDeleted: This item was deleted and can no longer be edited.
scoreCardInstructions: Tap to add, drag to subtract. Pick players to save the match.
seasonMetaEditing: You are editing an existing season.
tournamentMetaEditing: You are editing an existing tournament.
profileMeta: Update your display name and review your activity here.
profileEmptySinglesMatches: No singles matches in this list yet.
profileEmptyDoublesMatches: No doubles matches in this list yet.
profileMatchImpactWeightMeaning: All Elo and season changes below already include this singles/doubles weight.
profileMatchImpactReasonFavWin: You were favored, so the gain is smaller.
profileMatchImpactReasonUnderdogWin: You were the underdog, so the gain is larger.
profileMatchImpactReasonFavLoss: You were favored, so the loss is larger.
profileMatchImpactReasonUnderdogLoss: You were the underdog, so the loss is smaller.
profileMatchImpactReasonFallback: Your rating changed based on opponent strength and your current adjustment settings.
profileMatchImpactSeasonExpectedChance: Season win chance before this match:
profileMatchImpactSeasonFormulaSimple: Season score = skill estimate - attendance penalty:
profileMatchImpactSeasonNoPenaltySimple: No attendance penalty here, so season score follows skill estimate:
profileMatchImpactSeasonMeaning: Season score can move differently from Elo because certainty and attendance can also change.
sharedProfileMeta: Shared seasons, tournaments, and matches only.
activityHeatmapEmpty: No recorded matches in this period.
sharePanelDescription: This invite link can only be used once by one person.
shareSignInPrompt: Sign in to accept the invite.
shareAlreadyJoinedSeason: You are already part of this season.
shareAlreadyJoinedTournament: You are already part of this tournament.
shareNoSegment: Load or save a segment before sharing.
shareCreateFailure: Could not generate a share link.
shareJoinFailure: This share link could not be used.
faqSummaryIntro: The boxes below show the short version of the main rules.
faqSummaryCompareValue: Elo for overall skill · Glicko-2 for season form
faqSummaryCompareDetail: Global ranking uses Elo as your long-term overall skill rating. Season score uses Glicko-2 to rate season performance more fairly by also considering attendance and how reliable your results look within that season.
faqSummarySeasonDetail: The visible season score is a cautious Glicko-2 number, not the raw rating. It uses rating, uncertainty, and any attendance penalty.
faqSummaryEloDetail: Open play, season matches, and tournament matches all affect your global ranking while they stay active. You need 10 matches to rank above unqualified players.
faqSummarySeasonOnlyDetail: A season table ignores matches outside that season, unless a linked tournament match belongs to it.
faqSummaryCarryDetail: Carry over does not have one fixed starting score. It can be above or below 500 depending on your current global rating. A fresh reset can show 500.
faqSummaryAttendanceDetail: Attendance penalties are season-score point deductions based on consecutive missed weeks: first 2 misses free, then -4, -8, -16, -32, -64 points, capped at -128. Playing again resets the miss counter.
faqSummaryTournamentDetail: Tournament order comes from the bracket result, not from Elo or season score.
faqSummarySinglesValue: Singles count full · doubles count less
faqSummarySinglesDetail: Singles affect ratings more strongly. Doubles are softer because each team result counts as 70% of a singles match in both global and season rankings.
faqSummaryAchievementsDetail: Achievement points track milestones and progress, but they currently do not affect global ranking, season score, or tournament placement.
faqSummaryPaceDetail: Those step bands apply to global Elo. Season Glicko-2 does not use the same bands; it speeds up or settles down based more on result reliability and uncertainty within the season.
faqIntro: Simple answers about rankings, seasons, tournaments, and match setup.
privacyIntro: SpinRank only keeps what it needs to run the app and show your matches.
exitAppBody: Press back again to exit the app.
privacyPara1: We store your Google profile (name, email, avatar) for login, keep session tokens so you stay signed in, and keep every match, season, or tournament you add.
privacyPara2: All data lives inside Cloudflare Workers and D1; deleted matches stay marked but no longer affect rankings, and we never sell or share your info for marketing.
privacyPara3Prefix: Under GDPR you can view, correct, delete, or export your data by opening an issue on
